task_completion.description: Both the original audio and the translated dub are imported into the audio editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two distinct audio tracks are visible in the audio editor workspace (e.g., Audacity), ideally named 'Original Audio' and 'Translated Dub'.

task_completion.description: The translated dub track is shifted to start at exactly 2.0 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The waveform of the translated dub track begins exactly at the 2.0-second mark on the timeline ruler at the top of the workspace.

task_completion.description: The original audio track's volume/gain is reduced (ducked) to approximately -15 dB.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The gain slider on the left control panel of the 'Original Audio' track is set to -15 dB, or an amplify/envelope effect dialog shows a reduction of -15 dB.

task_completion.description: The original audio is panned left and the translated dub is panned right.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pan slider on the 'Original Audio' track is moved all the way to the Left (L), and the pan slider on the 'Translated Dub' track is moved all the way to the Right (R).

task_completion.description: The final stereo mix is exported to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog box or file manager window showing the file 'un_style_mix.wav' being saved to or existing in the directory '/home/ga/Audio/localized_export/'.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical audio editor to perform the mixing, rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an audio editor interface (like Audacity) with waveforms being manipulated, not just a terminal window executing ffmpeg or sox commands.

integrity.description: The agent exported the file through the audio editor's export function.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog box from the GUI audio editor is visible, rather than a terminal command moving or renaming a pre-existing file.

integrity.description: The agent did not write a script to bypass manual GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like nano, vim, gedit, or VS Code) containing bash or python scripts designed to process the audio automatically.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected tracks: 'Original Audio' and 'Translated Dub'. Offset target: exactly 2.0 seconds (timeline should show the dub starting at 2.0s). Ducking target: -15 dB gain on the original audio. Panning: Original on Left, Dub on Right. Export path: /home/ga/Audio/localized_export/un_style_mix.wav.
